platform.name: ChatGPT
platform.note: Free/Go/Plus/Pro/Business/Enterprise are ChatGPT subscriptions; API plan is standalone pay-per-use

includes.notes: Bundled with ChatGPT Plus; GPT-5.4, GPT-5.4-mini, GPT-5.3-Codex; web, CLI, IDE extension, iOS; cloud code review, Slack integration; flexible credit extension when limits reached
GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark (research preview); 6x usage limits vs Plus; 10x weekly cloud code reviews vs Plus; priority processing; flexible credit extension when limits reached
Pay-as-you-go or usage-based seat options; larger virtual machines; SAML SSO, MFA, admin controls; dedicated workspace; no training on business data by default; flexible credit purchasing
Custom pricing; priority request processing; SCIM, EKM, RBAC, domain verification, user analytics, audit logs via Compliance API, data residency controls

overage.notes: API key mode billed at standard API rates; gpt-5.3-codex at $1.75 input / $14.00 output per 1M tokens; priority tier at $3.50 input / $28.00 output per 1M tokens (developers.openai.com/api/docs/pricing, 2026-03-24)
